message:
test(storage): slow consumer + backpressure integration tests

Validate backpressure handling and bounded queue invariants:

Queue depth lifecycle tests:
- write_queue_depth_rises_under_concurrent_writes: concurrent writers
  on small (8-item) queue, verify drain to zero
- write_queue_bounded_under_heavy_load: 20 concurrent writers on
  4-item queue, sample depth never exceeds capacity
- write_queue_depth_returns_to_zero_after_drain: sequential writes
  leave queue empty

Backpressure integration tests:
- capture_channel_backpressure_detected: full 2-item channel, reserve
  times out (50ms), depth at capacity
- capture_channel_drains_when_consumer_resumes: 4-item channel fills
  and drains back to zero
- storage_concurrent_writers_dont_deadlock: 16 concurrent writers on
  4-item queue complete within 10s timeout, all 16 segments persisted
- gap_recording_works_under_backpressure: GAP record with correct
  seq_before/seq_after on small queue
- health_warning_threshold_generates_warnings: snapshot with 80% queue
  fill produces backpressure warning
- event_bus_detects_subscriber_lag: 8 events on 4-capacity bus, slow
  subscriber detects lag

wa-upg.12.5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
